title: Control Another's Pain
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{ForcePower
|image=
|name=Control Another's Pain
|alternate=
|alignment=
|area=Control and Alter<ref name="RPG">[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']]</ref>
|purpose=Allowed and individual to control the pain felt by another<ref name="RPG" />

'''Control Another's Pain''' was a [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] which used a combination of [[Force power/Legends#Control|Control]] and [[Force power/Legends#Sense|Sense]] skills. It allowed a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force user]] to suppress pain in another individual. The effect was easier if the target was emotionally close to the Force user, and by physical distance.<ref name="RPG" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|10|Only Droids Serve the Maker|reprint=1}} {{Mo}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin|New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' {{Mo}}
